fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the entry, as assigned from the specified number series when the entry was created.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the posting date of the entry.

fields.name: Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of document that generated the entry.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the document that generated the entry.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the entry.

fields.name: Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of the entry.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the entry.

fields.name: Applied
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the entry has been applied.
